titleStmt.title: SII 4.1169: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1169. (A.R. No. 298 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
maṁddāruṇḍu śrīramanu nāmaṇḍu jagatini Āmaṁtri
maṇi rājēṁdracōḍaja vanniyuṁ baḍasenu tadavarajuṇḍu bāndhavanidhānuṇḍu mānadhanuṇḍu sūrihṛdvadanasa
divākaruṇḍujvalakī¨rtticaṁdramāsadamalasa¨rvvadigmukhuṇḍu jaṁgamakalpamahīruvāṁbu bhūviditamahānubhāvuṇḍu vavitracaritruṇḍu vātruṇḍikṣitini Ø 1 śrīmadrā
ghavanṛpatiki saumitriyu dha¨rmmajunaku śakrātmajuṇḍunu rāmunaku hariyuṁ bōluga vatruṇḍagrajunaku nāptuṇḍayyenu [. 2*] vāsavasannibhuṇḍagu divākararājunakuṁ bulō
makanyāsamaśīlayai negaḍu nāyamasāniki nudbhaviṁcche gaṁggāsalilēśahāsaśaśikāśavi kāsapayōjakī¨rttikāṁttāsahituṁḍu dīprakaradhāmasudhāmuṇḍu sōmuṇḍunnatini Ø 3
bhīmabaluṇḍunu na¨rccitabhīmēsvaruṇḍa�na vīrape¨rmmāḍinṛpagrāmaṇiṁ golci divākarusōmaṇḍuviśvāsiyayyesūnṛtamahimanu [. 4*] viśvāsisōmanā¨ryyaṇḍuviśvaṁbharayaṁddu
negaḍe viśrutamahimanu śāśvatakī¨rtti dayāmati nīśvarapadabhakti nadhipahitanayaśaktini Ø 5 sucirayaśōvilāsuṇḍagu sōmunakuṁ kulapālīkāśirōvicakilapuṣpadāmamagu ve
nnamakuṁ brabhaviṁcce bhāratīkucataṭatārahāruṇḍanaghuṇḍalaghuṇḍu vini¨rggalatsudhāvacanaṇḍu dha¨rmmalōluṇḍu divākaruṇḍilapai sudhākaruṇḍilanu Ø 6 sāramati natuladhṛtisuvicāraṁbu
na nīti nakhilaśakunajñunu nācāramu naḍavasa vārāśivritāvanini divākarusari yoṇḍu nilan Ø 7 mitrutējuṇḍu divākararājunakuṁ bativratāṁbhōruha vāsanāṁbaragu prōlamakuṁ ja
maṁddāruṇḍu mēru ni ruṇḍu sittasaṁbhavākāruṇḍu sūrijanasahakāruṇḍu dēkanamādhavaṇḍunnatini Ø 8 samadārātinṛpāvanī-dharapavini śattrukṣamā
bhuvanīśamanassarō ṣṭaparapakṣakṣmāparājīmanaḥkumudā¨rkkunu velanāṇṭigoṁkkavibhudikpū¨rnnapratāpō
vaṁkkajavananu ṇḍamātyapadavisthituṇḍai . 9 śrīmatta¨rkkarasāṁbarēṁdu gaṇanaśrī
mātyamādha bhīmaśvarōdda
dīpava¨rtti gappūrava¨rttisēsi peṭṭiṁcce neṁttayu bhāsuramuga dēvabhaktuṇḍu dēkanamādhavaṇḍativicārasaṁpannu
lu naluvuruṁ būṇṭagāṁ dalarāsi pōtiyabōyini vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 ṇṭiki nityapaḍi golavaṁgala tribhuvanāṁkuśa nē
māna 1 likhitaṁ peddanācā¨ryyēṇa .
Digital edition of SII 4.1169 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
